* % Daily Value is based on a 2,000 calorie diet. Your daily values may be higher or lower based on your calorie needs.
† Daily Value (DV) not established.
Ingredients
Citric Acid, Natural and Artificial Flavors, Salt, Malic Acid, Sucralose, Silicon Dioxide, FD&C Yellow #6, FD&C Yellow #5.

Mix one (1) scoop with 8-12oz. of cold water. Consume before or during workouts. Combine with a balanced diet and regular resistance exercise.

KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN. FOR USE BY HEALTHY ACTIVE ADULTS ONLY. CONSULT YOUR PHYSICIAN BEFORE USING THIS PRODUCT IF YOU ARE TAKING ANY MEDICATION, ARE UNDER A PHYSICIAN'S CARE FOR A MEDICAL CONDITION, OR UNDER 18 YEARS OF AGE. NOT FOR USE BY WOMEN THAT ARE PREGNANT, TRYING TO GET PREGNANT, OR NURSING. DO NOT CONSUME CAFFEINE FROM OTHER SOURCES WHILE TAKING THIS PRODUCT. Caffeine Content: Approximately 120mg per serving.
Directions
Warnings
Expand Info
Product Information

SIZE, STRENGTH, ENERGY & HYDRATION*

R1 Charged Creatine combines the most widely researched ingredient for muscle size, strength and intensity, creatine, with a blend of concentrated tea leaf, green coffee, guarana, and yerba mate extracts to help energize the training experience. Each serving also includes a 500-milligram electrolyte blend to support hydration and replenish valuable minerals lost through sweat. When you’re ready to take charge of your high-intensity workouts, take R1 Charged Creatine*

  • ZERO Added Sugars
  • ZERO Fillers
  • ZERO Banned Substances

MICRONIZED CREATINE FORMULA

  • 5g Creatine Compounds
  • 3 Different Creatine Sources
  • 150mg Herbal Energy Blend (Tea, Coffee, Guarana, Mate)*
  • Approximately 120mg of Caffeine (Natural Source)
  • 500mg Electrolyte Blend Providing Potassium, Sodium, Magnesium, and Chloride
  • Carefully Blended and Packaged in a GMP-Certified Facility in the USA

WHO IS R1 CHARGED CREATINE FOR?

Healthy active individuals, such as body builders, powerlifters, and sprinters as well as football, rugby, hockey, and CrossFit® athletes, seeking to enhance high-intensity performance, increase strength, and add size.*

HOW DOES THE ENERGY IN R1 CHARGED CREATINE COMPARE TO A PRE-WORKOUT?

R1 Charged Creatine provides a modest, anytime energy boost from a combination of four naturally charged herbal extracts. Each scoop provides the caffeine equivalent of a strong 6 oz. cup of coffee (~120 mg). In comparison, most pre-workouts contain 200-400 milligrams of caffeine (or more) per serving.*

WHEN DO I USE R1 CHARGED CREATINE?

In the morning to jump start the day; around workouts to boost training intensity, hydration, and recovery; before big exams or meetings to increase alertness; and/or in the afternoon to crush midday energy slumps.*
